recommendations.title: Women on the Verge of a Nervous Breakdown
recommendations.overview: After being dumped by her lover, Pepa finds her life and the lives of those around her spiraling out of control in a deliciously chaotic series of events.

recommendations.title: The Other Man
recommendations.overview: The story of a husband who suspects his wife of adultery, and sets out to track down the other man in her life.

recommendations.title: Babygirl
recommendations.overview: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

recommendations.title: Original Sin
recommendations.overview: A young man is plunged into a life of subterfuge, deceit and mistaken identity in pursuit of a femme fatale whose heart is never quite within his grasp.

recommendations.title: Automata
recommendations.overview: Jacq Vaucan, an insurance agent of ROC robotics corporation, routinely investigates the case of manipulating a robot. What he discovers will have profound consequences for the future of humanity.

recommendations.title: Acts of Vengeance
recommendations.overview: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

recommendations.title: Evita
recommendations.overview: The hit musical based on the life of Evita Duarte, an Argentinian actress who eventually became the wife of Argentinian president Juan Perón, and the most beloved and hated woman in Argentina.

recommendations.title: Mean Dreams
recommendations.overview: When two youngsters meet and fall for each other, they must go on the run from the girl's corrupt father, who is also the sheriff of the town.

recommendations.title: Justin and the Knights of Valour
recommendations.overview: A heart-warming tale about friendship, honor & courage, which sees a young boy become a man as he embarks on a quest to become a knight.

recommendations.title: Haywire
recommendations.overview: A black ops soldier seeks payback after she is betrayed and left for dead.
